title: galium mollugo var. scabridulum
intro: Galium mollugo var. scabridulum, also known as a variant of the Galium mollugo plant, is a flowering plant species in the bedstraw family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Galium mollugo var. scabridulum include treating skin issues such as wounds, eczema, and acne, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
